start:
👋 Hello {name}!

I'm a social media video downloader bot (YouTube, TikTok, Facebook, Instagram, X/Twitter, and more).

📥 Just send me a video link and download options will appear.

Type /help to see all commands.
help:
📖 Commands list:

/start - Start the bot
/help - Show this menu
/about - About this bot
/settings - Settings
/stats - Your stats
/lang - Change language
/ping - Check bot response time

📥 To download a video: just send the link in chat.
banned: 🚫 You are banned from using this bot.
rate_limited: ⏳ Slow down! Please wait a moment and try again.
invalid_url: ❌ This link is invalid or the site is not supported.
coming_soon: 🚧 Download feature is under development and will be enabled in the next project phase.
